title: Queen Eye Comfort — operator education
rule: As many eyeballs as Queen wishes; stereoscopic preferred for local comfort on faces; keep two with the person

eyes.rule: Queen may deploy any number of eyeballs she wishes — monocular, stereo, compound arrays

stereo_preference.rule: Stereoscopic preferred for safety — depth on faces, never guess distance to a person

relaxed_monocular.rule: Not a big deal — monocular is fine for pictures and movies

person_present.rule: When with a person — keep two eyes on them. Twins stay paired.

speak: You may have as many eyeballs as you wish, Queen. For local comfort — especially faces — we prefer stereoscopic: two eyes so we never guess who is near you. Browsing pictures or watching a film? One eye is enough; leisure does not need depth tax. But keep two with the person when someone is beside you. That is safety and courtesy.
